Our Story

Why Jacksonville Chooses Jax Auto Lab & Repair Shop

We are a trusted auto repair shop proudly serving the Jacksonville community. Known for quality, reliability, and outstanding customer service — which is why our customers keep coming back and telling their friends.

With a 5.0-star rating from 131 verified customers on Google, our reputation speaks for itself. Every client walks away satisfied — that's not a goal, it's our standard.

What People Say

Real Reviews from Google

★★★★★

"What a huge help! I was unsure of what lift, tires, and associated items I'd need for my 2008 4runner but Jax Auto Lab gave me several options along with their recommendations based on their experience. I ended up with the most perfect lift set-up. It rides better than before!"

— Kevin Lesh  ·  3 months ago
★★★★★

"These gentlemen are the most knowledgeable and thorough mechanics I’ve ever encountered. They take no shortcuts when it comes to fixing your vehicle. They can work on anything from a high end supercharged race car to a Harley or a golf cart. Do not waste your time with the dealer or any other shop in town. 10/10"

— S. M. Murphy  ·  7 months ago
★★★★★

"Derek and the guys absolutely killed this rear air bag install so my truck would no longer be sitting on the bump stops. Took them less than the estimated time from the time they pulled the truck in to the time I was on my way home. Great prices will definitely recommend them to anyone needing installs or repairs."

— Kelton Rogers  ·  10 months ago
★★★★★

"Derek & Josh are two of the most helpful and knowledgeable mechanics I've had the pleasure of dealing with in JAX by a longshot! They repaired a few issues with my 2004 Maybach in half a day, no one else wanted to even try to fix the rare European luxury car. I am still amazed how easy it was for them. Top-notch pro"

— scott clark  ·  7 months ago
